steps.title: Use the contrast cue
steps.content: The word Unlike contrasts Mori, who adopted European painting methods, with Saito. The example says Saito made Dragon against Tiger using pigments on silk, a traditional Japanese approach.

steps.title: Pick the precise verb
steps.content: Choice A and choice B would suggest Saito rejected or doubted traditional Japanese approaches, which conflicts with the example. Choice D does not fit the relationship between an artist and an artistic method. The needed word means accepted and used. The answer is C.
